header.location: Portland, OR (Open to Remote or Relocation)

summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Learning & Development professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, building scalable programs grounded in evidence, and partnering cross-functionally for sustainable impact. I increasingly use AI and automation to accelerate content creation and eliminate manual work—through human-centered, systematic design.
